item.title: Men in Black, 1997 - ★★★½
item.description: This movie is responsible for not keeping the image of aliens normal. I mean why there's gotta be so much goeey shit man 😭😭
item.dc:creator: mehmehsloth Pratham Sharma

item.title: Karthik Calling Karthik, 2010 - ★★★½
item.description: Whole ass movie around a phone feature
item.dc:creator: mehmehsloth Pratham Sharma

item.title: Marty Supreme, 2025 - ★★★★
item.description: Typa shit i would have to do fullfill all that talk in japan 2026 group i was added in this morning
item.dc:creator: mehmehsloth Pratham Sharma

item.title: Thangalaan, 2024 - ★★★½
item.description: It's a bit loose here and there but nonetheless great storytelling and acting. Plus i was in awe with the camera work.
item.dc:creator: mehmehsloth Pratham Sharma

item.title: Homebound, 2025 - ★★★★★
item.description: Fun lil movie to watch with family ☺️
item.dc:creator: mehmehsloth Pratham Sharma

item.title: Birdman or (The Unexpected Virtue of Ignorance), 2014
item.letterboxd:filmTitle: Birdman or (The Unexpected Virtue of Ignorance)
item.dc:creator: mehmehsloth Pratham Sharma

item.title: High Fidelity, 2000 - ★★★
item.description:
Very relevant to incel culture. May we all stop being assholes and narcissists.

Also damn jack black sang his heart in that last track
item.dc:creator: mehmehsloth Pratham Sharma

item.title: BEEF, 2023 - ★★★★★
item.description: "I found out reason for me to change who I used to be " ⛹️🎉🕺🕺🕺
item.dc:creator: mehmehsloth Pratham Sharma

item.title: Forrest Gump, 1994 - ★★★★★
item.description:
10 mins in the movie and I was already crying

Edit:
Just saw the amount of negative comments and most of them had oldboy in their top movies. Imho people who love oldboy are batshit crazy and psychotic
item.dc:creator: mehmehsloth Pratham Sharma

item.title: Hacksaw Ridge, 2016 - ★★★★
item.description: Gonna start the war season with this
item.dc:creator: mehmehsloth Pratham Sharma

item.title: Watching the Detectives, 2007 - ★★★½
item.description: Oh it's Lucy liu, sure then all this is acceptable

item.letterboxd:filmTitle: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets

item.title: Mickey 17, 2025 - ★★★½
item.description: the amount of negligence we will show to lives of those who we think are indispensable, replacable or just not us
item.dc:creator: mehmehsloth Pratham Sharma

item.title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone, 2001 - ★★★½
item.letterboxd:filmTitle: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
item.dc:creator: mehmehsloth Pratham Sharma

item.title: Alien, 1979 - ★★★½
item.description: Every scene of the set of ship can be a stared for hours
item.dc:creator: mehmehsloth Pratham Sharma

item.title: Princess Mononoke, 1997 - ★★★★★
item.description: If 10/10 wolf clan baddie spits in my mouth, I too would cry and die for her
item.dc:creator: mehmehsloth Pratham Sharma

item.title: No Country for Old Men, 2007
item.description: There was shooting, lot of dialog and texas. Surprisingly low amount of horses but a high amount of violent people
item.dc:creator: mehmehsloth Pratham Sharma

item.title: Scent of a Woman, 1992 - ★★★
item.description: Dead poets society for fucked up kids
item.dc:creator: mehmehsloth Pratham Sharma

item.title: A Real Pain, 2024 - ★★★
item.description: I wish I was like benji. A non confrontational version of benji.
item.dc:creator: mehmehsloth Pratham Sharma

item.title: Nobody, 2021 - ★★★
item.description: Get in beef instead of going to therapy
item.dc:creator: mehmehsloth Pratham Sharma

item.title: Four Weddings and a Funeral, 1994 - ★★
item.description: Wait so british people play scrabble in afterparty?
item.dc:creator: mehmehsloth Pratham Sharma

item.title: Prisoners, 2013 - ★★★★★
item.description: Detective loki might be one of the best police officers in any movies. And jake gyllenhaal never really misses any role ( yet oscars have some beef with him ).
item.dc:creator: mehmehsloth Pratham Sharma

item.title: Chungking Express, 1994 - ★★★★
item.description: 2nd part of movie is soo fire.
item.dc:creator: mehmehsloth Pratham Sharma

item.title: His Three Daughters, 2023 - ★★★
item.description: Just cause I liked hoodie in the trailer didn't mean that I had to watch it
item.dc:creator: mehmehsloth Pratham Sharma

item.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers, 2002 - ★★★★★
item.letterboxd:filmTitle: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers
item.description: That one fight scene where horses are coming downhill to kill uruk hais is alone worth the four hour set-up of first movie
item.dc:creator: mehmehsloth Pratham Sharma

item.description: Why. I even made popcorns and got snacks.
